name: Odyssey Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Odyssey Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing innovative therapeutics. The company's most advanced product candidate, OD-001, is in an ongoing Phase 2a trial for ulcerative colitis, with other candidates in preclinical or IND-enabling studies. Odyssey has no approved products and has never generated revenue from product sales.

exposures.sentence: Our business depends entirely on the success of our product candidates and development programs, including OD-001 and OD-002.

catalysts.event: Planned commencement of Phase 2a combination trial and Phase 2b monotherapy trial for OD-001 in ulcerative colitis
catalysts.sentence: Our most advanced product candidate, OD-001, is in an ongoing phase 2a trial with other trials planned to commence in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: IND-enabling activities and planned Phase 1/2a clinical trial for SLC15A4 program
catalysts.sentence: We intend to use the aggregate net proceeds to us from this offering and the concurrent private placement to (i) advance the clinical development of OD-001, our most advanced product candidate, through 12-week induction readouts from our planned phase 2a combination trial and phase 2b monotherapy trial in ulcerative colitis, (ii) advance our SLC15A4 program through IND-enabling activities and our planned phase 1/2a clinical trial.
